furniture.name: TV Cabinet
furniture.description: Your living room deserves a centerpiece as stylish as it is functional. The LeisureMod Avery TV Stand combines modern flair with practical features, offering a sleek top shelf that supports TVs up to 70 inches. Its spacious design includes open shelves, two drawers, and a large cabinet for organizing media devices, gaming consoles, and decor. Built from durable MDF and stainless steel, the sled base and powder-coated finish ensure strength and scratch resistance. Convenient handles and easy-to-clean surfaces make maintenance effortless, and assembly is a breeze with the included manual. Sleek, sturdy, and effortlessly chic, the LeisureMod Avery is the ultimate fusion of style and storage.

furniture.name: GLOBAL FURNITURE USA Reclining Sofa
furniture.description: 3-seater power reclining sofa with USB charging ports and adjustable headrests.

furniture.name: Storage Bench
furniture.description: timeless style and all the functions you can need. The storage bench is designed for narrow spaces and handles big and small items.

furniture.name: Fibura Elegant Linen Floor Lamp
furniture.description: Add warmth and modern elegance to your interiors with the Fibura Elegant Floor Lamp. Featuring a slender Champagne Bronze metal frame with a feminine swoop, this lamp is paired with pleated or plain linen shades that softly diffuse light for a cozy atmosphere. Adjustable in height, it works beautifully in living rooms, bedrooms, and hallways, and its plug-in design with inline switch ensures convenience.
